name: Oriental Slaw
recipeIngredient: 3 packages ramen noodles, broken into pieces
1 package slaw mix, or shredded cabbage & carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dressing ingredients (4 tablespoons sugar, 1/2 cup oil, 1 teaspoon salt and pepper, and 6 tablespoons vinegar).
2. Just before serving, add the nuts and noodles to the cabbage.
3. Toss everything with the dressing.
